news.headline: Sudan: Security Council warns of mass atrocity risk in El Obeid
news.summary: The UN Security Council has expressed alarm over reports of substantial military reinforcements by the Rapid Support Forces (RSF) around El Obeid in Sudan, warning of the risk of a potential ground offensive on the city.
